zh.lifeSummary: 當Rei Pedro II de Aragón於1178年7月11日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡時，他的父親Alphonse II roi d'Aragon21歲，母親Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón23歲。他於1204年6月22日與Marie de Montpellier在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1213年9月12日在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛姆斯特享年35歲，埋葬在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rei Pedro II de Aragón于1178年7月11日出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡时，他的父亲Alphonse II roi d'Aragon21岁，母亲Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón23岁。他于1204年6月22日与Marie de Montpellier在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1213年9月12日在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛姆斯特享年35岁，埋葬在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Rei Pedro II de Aragón was born on 11 July 1178, in Huesca, Aragón, Spain, his father, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, was 21 and his mother, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, was 23. He married Marie de Montpellier on 22 June 1204, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 September 1213, in Muret, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Huesca, Aragón, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rei Pedro II de Aragón est né le 11 juillet 1178, à Huesca, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Montpellier le 22 juin 1204, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1213, à Muret, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Huesca, Aragón, Espagne.

de.Villanueva de Sigena, Huesca, Aragón, Es: Villanueva de Sigena, Huesca, Aragón, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Rei Pedro II de Aragón am 11. Juli 1178 in Huesca, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alphonse II roi d'Aragon 21 und seine Mutter Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón 23. Er hat am 22. Juni 1204 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich Marie de Montpellier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. September 1213 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Muret, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Huesca, Aragón, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rei Pedro II de Aragón è nato il il 11 luglio 1178 nel Huesca, Aragón, Spagna, il suo padre, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Montpellier il 22 giugno 1204, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 settembre 1213, nel Muret, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Huesca, Aragón, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rei Pedro II de Aragónが1178年7月11日にスペインアラグoンハエスカで生まれた時，父Alphonse II roi d'Aragonは21歳，母Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragónは23歳であった。1204年6月22日にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールでMarie de Montpellierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1213年9月12日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオンムレトで35歳で死去し，スペインアラグoンハエスカにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rei Pedro II de Aragón(이)가 1178년 7월 11일 스페인 아라그o 후스카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alphonse II roi d'Aragon(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1204년 6월 22일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Marie de Montpellier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1213년 9월 12일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 머트에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 아라그o 후스카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rei Pedro II de Aragón nasceu em 11 de julho de 1178, em Huesca, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Montpellier em 22 de junho de 1204, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1213, em Muret, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Huesca, Aragón, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rei Pedro II de Aragón родился 11 июля 1178 г. в местности хуеска, арагoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Alphonse II roi d'Aragon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Montpellier 22 июня 1204 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 сентября 1213 г. в местности мурет, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности хуеска, арагoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rei Pedro II de Aragón nació el 11 de julio de 1178, en Huesca, Aragón, España, su papá, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Marie de Montpellier el 22 de junio de 1204, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1213, en Muret, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Huesca, Aragón, España.
